versions.version_description: It's simple chords and sounds great

I've included much needed chords in the bridge, as well as adlibs in parenthesis of which are missing from other contributions. Also, for Organized and concise viewing with line breaks separating sections.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
To play along with the original version in the original key, capo the 3rd fret.
Enjoy my first submission :)   

[Verses]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
It's too hard to sleep[/tab]

I got the sheets on the floor
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Nothing on me[/tab]

And I can't take it no more
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]
It's a hundred degrees[/tab]

I got one foot out the door
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Where are my keys?[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch] 
Cause I gotta leave, yeah[/tab]

[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]
In the back of the cab[/tab]

I tip the driver, 'head of time
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Get me there fast[/tab]

I got your body on my mind
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
I want it bad[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Ooh, just the thought of you gets me so high, so high[/tab]
